hypothesis: If a prompt-tuned LLM agent (GPT-4o using ReAct and DSPy tool access) is used to plan three-step syntheses in the Nb–O physics-based simulator, then it will achieve comparable or higher success rates than a discretized A* search while visiting fewer simulator states (i.e., greater computational efficiency) because the LLM leverages learned heuristics and semantic reasoning to guide action selection.
